items.title: Enhance WeChat 4.0 Key Scanning Efficiency in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a robust single-pass memory scanning method for WeChat 4.0's WCDB raw keys, significantly improving the efficiency of key extraction. The new approach utilizes a salt-anchored scan that reduces the number of full memory scans from 17 to just one, ensuring accurate key retrieval while maintaining existing verification processes. Validation tests confirm successful extraction of all database keys in a fraction of the time previously required.

items.title: Introducing Cost Estimation API for Maestro in Index 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new `POST /maestro/estimates` API to provide cost predictions before video production. This feature leverages a planner agent to analyze project briefs and estimate delivery parameters, allowing users to see potential costs based on their specifications. The estimated cost is significantly lower than actual video production, enhancing user decision-making and budgeting.

items.title: Enhance Reseller Wholesale Design for Nexior in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive design document for the reseller wholesale model, addressing key client requirements. It includes new architecture, compliance measures, and risk assessments to ensure a seamless integration of the funding pool mechanism. The changes aim to enhance the platform's capabilities while maintaining existing functionalities and compliance standards.

items.title: Enhance Usage Analytics with Dynamic Views in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive three-view card for usage analytics, featuring trend, share, and breakdown visualizations. It also adds an auto-refresh toggle for real-time data updates and streamlines CSV export functionality. Additionally, the update enhances internationalization support across 18 languages.

items.title: Enhance GA4 Tracking for Key Events in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces GA4 business-event tracking for critical nodes within the application, enhancing our telemetry capabilities. Key events such as API key creation and order creation are now tracked and sent to both RUM and GA4, providing valuable insights for the marketing dashboard. The implementation ensures that sensitive information is not exposed, maintaining user privacy while improving analytics accuracy.

items.title: Integrate GA4 Tracking for Enhanced Analytics in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update implements Google Analytics 4 tracking in Nexior by injecting the gtag.js script into the index.html file. The integration uses lazy loading to ensure that analytics requests do not block page rendering, especially in regions with network restrictions. Key changes include the addition of a new JSON change file and modifications to the HTML head section for seamless tracking.

items.title: Integrate GA4 Tracking for Enhanced Analytics in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Google Analytics 4 tracking to the auth.acedata.cloud platform, allowing for improved data collection alongside existing Baidu statistics. The integration employs lazy loading for the GA4 script to ensure that it does not block page rendering or load events, even in cases of slow network conditions. Key changes were made to the index.html file to implement this functionality seamlessly.

items.title: Integrate GA4 Tracking for Enhanced Analytics in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates Google Analytics 4 tracking into the platform by injecting the gtag.js snippet into the `index.html` file. This change ensures that analytics data is collected across the entire site without affecting existing scripts. The implementation is designed to be efficient and compliant with the platform's architecture.

items.title: Unlock WeChat 4.0 Sessions and Messages via UIA in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new reader for WeChat 4.0 that allows direct access to chat sessions and messages without needing a WCDB decryption key. Key features include the ability to read session details and open messages, with enhanced error handling and testing. The API now returns real conversation names and statuses, significantly improving user experience.

items.title: Enhance Maestro Videos API with Style Enum in Backend 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces a new `style` enum to the Maestro Videos API, aligning it with the deterministic style presets from the PlatformService. The enum includes 16 distinct values, each with a detailed description, improving the clarity of the API reference and ensuring typed clients reflect the actual backend capabilities. The change maintains backward compatibility by still accepting free-text strings.

items.title: Sync Maestro Style Dropdown with Backend Enum in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update synchronizes the Maestro style dropdown in Nexior with the new backend style enum, enhancing the mapping of dropdown options to actual backend capabilities. The previous options that did not correspond to any backend functionality have been removed, ensuring a more reliable user experience. Additionally, new styles such as 'glass', 'luxury', and 'swiss' have been added, with corresponding labels in multiple languages.

items.title: Enhance Maestro Style Mapping for Consistency in Platform Service 🎨
items.summary: This update transforms the maestro style configuration from vague free-text hints into a structured enum that maps directly to specific visual capabilities. Key changes include the restructuring of the style registry and the introduction of a new directive that ensures reproducible visual identities. Backward compatibility is maintained, allowing for seamless integration with existing styles while enhancing overall clarity and functionality.

items.title: Enhance File Transfer Safety Checks in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update implements a safety guard for the File Transfer feature, ensuring that the opened title must match '文件传输助手' or 'File Transfer' before sending messages. A new test has been added to verify that sending is aborted if the wrong chat is opened. Overall, 34 tests have passed with no issues detected.

items.title: Enhance WeChat 4.0 Message Safety in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a fail-closed verification process for sending messages via WeChat 4.0, ensuring that messages are only sent to the correct chat. Key changes include selecting the first search result and verifying the chat title before sending. This enhancement prevents accidental message leaks into incorrect conversations, significantly improving user safety.

items.title: Sync Maestro Scenarios and Thumbnails in Nexior 🎥
items.summary: This update realigns the Maestro scenario picker with the backend taxonomy by removing the outdated 'slideshow' option and introducing 'captions' as a first-class scenario. Additionally, generic thumbnail illustrations have been replaced with real-frame previews from generated videos, enhancing user experience by accurately representing each scenario's output.

items.title: Streamline Wisdom Package Overlay on Boot in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the boot process by overlaying the bundled Wisdom package onto the installed site-packages, ensuring that the image serves as the source of truth for the code. The change eliminates the need for manual GUI hot-patching and pip reinstallations, making deployments smoother and more reliable. The new batch script runs before the API starts, preventing any race conditions.

items.title: Enhance Google Image Search with Size Filter in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an `image_size` parameter to the Google image search API, allowing users to request high-resolution images. The new mapping for image sizes ensures that downstream processes receive sharper images, addressing previous issues with blurry results. The implementation is backward-compatible, maintaining payload integrity when the parameter is not specified.

items.title: Enhance Image Sourcing and Avatar Guidelines in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces two key fixes to improve agent-guidance based on recent video-QA findings. High-resolution images will now be sourced by specifying `image_size: "large"`, ensuring better clarity. Additionally, avatar guidelines have been refined to prevent silent segments and avoid promotional labeling, enhancing the overall quality of the content.

items.title: Enhance Google Search Docs with Image Size Guidance in Skills 📚
items.summary: This update adds the `image_size` parameter to the Google Search skill documentation, providing clear guidance on sourcing high-resolution images. It emphasizes using the largest image dimensions for full-screen displays and advises against using thumbnail URLs as final assets. This change aims to improve the quality of images used in applications.

items.title: Enhance WeChat 4.0 Quick-Login with OCR Detection in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an OCR-anchored quick-login feature for WeChat 4.0, allowing the application to automatically detect and click the 'Log In' button for remembered accounts. Key changes include the addition of a new login driver and modifications to existing detection methods, ensuring seamless restoration of dropped sessions without requiring a QR scan. Comprehensive tests have been implemented to validate the functionality and prevent errors.

items.title: Enhance Imagery Requirements to Prevent False Rejections in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a structural change to the imagery requirements in the maestro IMAGERY gate, ensuring that real imagery is sourced before video composition. The new `_fidelity_directive` function enforces rules that require real images for identifiable subjects and mandates that all assets remain within the project directory. These changes aim to reduce terminal rejects during the delivery stage, improving overall workflow efficiency.

items.title: Enhance Image Rendering Logic in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update improves the image rendering logic in the nanobanana component by ensuring that images are displayed whenever valid image data exists, regardless of the success flag. The changes include the introduction of a new `showResult` condition that checks for the presence of an image URL, thus preventing valid images from being hidden due to a missing success flag. This enhancement aims to provide a more reliable user experience in the Nexior application.

items.title: Enhance success flag handling for terminal tasks in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses an issue where the success flag was missing in the response from the nano-banana task, causing valid results to be misinterpreted as failures. The fix ensures that the success flag is only added if it is absent, preserving explicit values set by the worker. Additionally, a regression test has been introduced to validate this behavior, alongside a corresponding frontend fix in Nexior.

items.title: Optimize nano-banana routing for faster performance in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update demotes `cqtai` to the second position in the nano-banana routing configuration to reduce latency caused by its frequent failures. By prioritizing `mountsea`, which has a better performance record, the majority of requests will now bypass the delays associated with `cqtai`. Additionally, the configuration for the `bananarouter-official` channel has been incorporated into the repository to prevent deployment issues.

items.title: Boost CPU Requests for Better HPA Stability in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update increases the CPU requests for the main container from 50m to 100m, addressing sensitivity issues with the Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA). The change ensures that the HPA only scales up under genuine load, reducing unnecessary pod spikes and maintaining a more stable performance. The limits remain unchanged at 500m, providing ample headroom for resource management.

items.title: Boost AuthBackend Performance with WSGI gthread in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the AuthBackend by switching from ASGI to WSGI with gthread, allowing for a significant increase in concurrent request handling from 8 to 64 slots. Key changes include modifications to the Dockerfile, deployment configurations, and the introduction of Horizontal Pod Autoscaling (HPA) to manage load effectively. These improvements ensure smoother login experiences and better resource management without altering client interactions.

items.title: Optimize Application List Performance in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update significantly improves the performance of the application list endpoint by addressing the N+1 query problem. Key changes include memoizing results in the serializer and optimizing the queryset with `select_related` and `prefetch_related` to reduce database hits. The modifications have been validated with all tests passing successfully.

items.title: Boosted Concurrency and Health Checks in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the platform's backend by doubling the concurrency of the gunicorn workers from 4 to 8, addressing issues with request delays. A new health check endpoint has been added, along with a relaxed liveness probe to ensure better service stability under load. Additionally, a Horizontal Pod Autoscaler has been implemented to dynamically manage pod replicas based on CPU utilization.

items.title: Scale up platform-backend for better performance in Backend 🚀
items.summary: The deployment configuration for the platform-backend has been updated to increase the number of replicas from 2 to 4. This change enhances throughput and provides additional availability redundancy, ensuring a more robust service. The modification was straightforward and carries no logical risks.

items.title: Enhance Live Debugging with Guarded Exec Endpoint in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a guarded `POST /api/debug/exec` endpoint that allows for live introspection of the Wisdom appliance by executing Python code. The feature is designed to enhance development efficiency by enabling programmatic access to the WCDB schema and other data without relying on the GUI. Multiple safety measures are implemented to prevent unauthorized access and ensure stability during execution.

items.title: Achieve WeChat 4.0 Parity for Process and Login Detection in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the Wisdom API with WeChat 4.0, enhancing process and login detection capabilities. Key changes include improved process detection for both WeChat 3.x and 4.0, a new login detection method for WeChat 4.0, and refined message type mapping. Comprehensive tests have been added to ensure functionality across both versions.
